questions.question: Describe the key differences between a normative approach and a descriptive approach in the context of AI ethics and public policy. Provide an example to illustrate your point. (15 marks)
Which of the following research methods would be most appropriate for evaluating the impact of AI on a specific social good, such as healthcare or education? Explain your choice. (10 marks)

A researcher is developing an AI system to support decision-making in a public policy context. What are the key ethical considerations that the researcher should take into account, and how would you recommend the researcher address these considerations? (20 marks)
